page_content:
Formerly: LFSC609D.

CLFS619 Special Topics in Chemistry (1-3 Credits) Topics of current interest and special importance. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs. Formerly: LFSC619.

CLFS620 Modern Molecular Genetics (3 Credits)

An overview of genetics including the genetic basis/components in prevalent diseases, genetically engineered organisms and foods, the importance of knowing the complete DNA sequence of organisms.
